title: Get notified when an automation fails
excerpt: There is still no notification when an automation stops working. Could Monday do something about this and set up an email notification to the creator of the automation to advise that it stopped working (when the automati…

posts.author: Fan8 (Fannie Huet)
posts.cookedHtml: There is still no notification when an automation stops working. Could Monday do something about this and set up an email notification to the creator of the automation to advise that it stopped working (when the automation fails)?
